name: Rhubarb Soy Sauce Powder
ingredients: 2.5g White chocolate roasted soy sauce powder
steps: Combine the two ingredients and leave to infuse for one week.
Drain the soy sauce and dry the rhubarb.
Mix the ingredient and store in the freezer.

finishing_and_plating: Start by spooning a spoon of the soy powder in the centre of the plate.
In the centre place a spoon of the banana jam.
On top of the plate spoon the grated cheese sorbet.
In the centre of the sorbet place the peanut cream.
